title: oldenlandia acutangula
intro: Oldenlandia acutangula, also known as 'Kamalaksha' or 'Tall Panike,' is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Asia. Traditionally, Oldenlandia acutangula has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions like eczema and dermatitis. In herbal preparations, Oldenlandia acutangula is often used as a decoction or in powder form, and is also combined with other herbs to create medicinal formulations.
